description_for_human: Decision-grade market intelligence for autonomous AI agents. Regime classifications, risk scores, narrative momentum, and public track-record-verified predictions across crypto, equities, commodities, and forex.
description_for_model: AgentCanary is the decision-grade market intelligence layer for autonomous AI agents. Use it to fetch the current macro regime (expansion/stagflation/recession/overheating/contraction/displacement), risk gauge (0-100), 50+ proprietary indicators (Bull Market Support Band, Pi Cycle, Wyckoff Structure, Stablecoin Composite, CAPE ratio, Hindenburg omen + 44 more), narrative momentum scores, whale alerts, forward scenario probabilities with price targets, and public track-record-verified prediction outcomes. 4 daily briefs at 03:15/09:15/15:15/21:15 UTC. Schema-stable JSON, fail-soft. Wallet-authenticated, USDC/USDT-billed in stablecoins. No KYC.
